fields.label: Education Context
fields.description: The subject area, grade band, assessment setting, item type, response format, and rubric structure when reported.

fields.label: Response Origin
fields.description: Whether analyzed responses are real, synthetic, hybrid, or comparator sets, and how each origin is used.

fields.label: Rubric Label Space
fields.description: The scoring labels used in the study, such as correct/incorrect, partial credit, ordinal score, category, or free-text rationale.

fields.label: Label Source
fields.description: Whether correctness or score labels come from humans, generated targets, model labels, adjudication, or source datasets.

fields.label: Generation Model
fields.description: The model family, version, provider, fine-tuning status, or unavailable-model note for generated responses.

fields.label: Generation Method
fields.description: The synthetic response generation workflow, such as template generation, zero-shot LLM prompting, few-shot prompting, fine-tuning, filtering, or hybrid generation.

fields.label: Prompt Strategy
fields.description: Prompt ingredients including rubric text, examples, target labels, error types, persona framing, self-revision, or iterative refinement.

fields.label: Evaluation Method
fields.description: How synthetic response quality or scoring impact is evaluated, including human judgment, distributional similarity, label fidelity, scorer agreement, downstream scorer performance, or qualitative error analysis.

fields.label: Scorer Use
fields.description: Whether synthetic responses are used for scorer training, augmentation, validation, calibration, benchmarking, stress testing, or not used with a scorer.

fields.label: Real Response Comparator
fields.description: Whether the study compares synthetic responses to real student responses and whether those responses share items, rubrics, grade band, domain, and label source.

fields.label: Reported Metrics
fields.description: Reported quantitative or qualitative metrics such as accuracy, F1, kappa, agreement rate, calibration, distributional distance, diversity, realism ratings, or expert themes.

fields.label: Limitations
fields.description: Study limitations and synthesis constraints that prevent overgeneralization.

fields.label: Source Locator
fields.description: The section, table, appendix, page, or other locator used to verify the extracted fact.
